## Checklist

- [ ] `uv run ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `uv run ruff format --check .` passes
- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes
- [ ] Added or updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated the README or skill if behavior changed
- [ ] Change stays within the read-only HackerNews API (no posting, voting, or authenticated actions)
